candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line above operating profit, so it appears outside the selected COGS row 'and goods for resale'. However, it is a group-level operating D&A total and is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales specific, so assigning it to COGS would be speculative.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation amortization of property, - Balancing value
candidates.why: Looks like a derived/component balancing line under the broader depreciation/amortization section rather than a clean COGS-specific D&A row. Not suitable to add separately to COGS without clear bucket attribution.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Separate operating depreciation line, but not labelled as COGS-related. Could span multiple functions, so adding it to COGS would risk misclassification.

candidates.row_label: Amortisation and impairment of intangible assets
candidates.why: Separate operating amortisation total, but not identified as cost-of-sales related and also includes impairment, which is out of scope for D&A extraction. Not appropriate for COGS_DA.

variables.notes: The selected COGS bucket is only 'and goods for resale'. Separate operating D&A rows are visible, which suggests D&A is not embedded in that selected row; however, none of the visible D&A rows is clearly labelled as COGS/cost of sales related. Using any of them for COGS_DA would require unsupported allocation of total operating D&A across functions. Conservative output is empty with manual review.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line above operating profit, so it appears outside the selected XSGA component rows ('Staff costs', 'Share-Based Payments', 'Research & Development'). But it is a total operating D&A line, not clearly SG&A-specific.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Separate operating depreciation row that could relate partly to overhead functions, but the statement does not identify it as SG&A/admin/R&D specific.

candidates.row_label: Amortisation and impairment of intangible assets
candidates.why: Separate operating amortisation line, but it includes impairment and is not clearly tied to SG&A. Also there are lower-level amortisation components beneath it.

This could be R&D-related amortisation, but the statement already has a separate 'Research & Development' row that was selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD. Per the R&D interaction rule, adding an R&D-type amortisation row separately would likely distort the construction unless clearly needed.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Intangible Assets excluding Goodwill - Total

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket is a set of component rows, and separate operating D&A lines exist outside those rows, so some overhead D&A may indeed sit outside the selected XSGA components. However, the excerpt does not provide a clean SG&A-only or admin-only D&A row. The visible D&A rows are group-level operating totals or mixed categories, and one possible R&D-related amortisation component should not be added given the separate above-EBIT R&D row already mapped to both XSGA and XRD. Conservative output is empty with manual review.
